actions.value:
Since the swap is stuck, as you can see here ---, you should be able to claim your funds back by using this tool:
https://app.symbiosis.finance/pending
 
Tap Connect Wallet, upper right, tap Wallet Connect.
In Edge, login, tap Side Menu, tap Wallet Connect, tap New Connection and frame the QRCode. Select your wallet where the transaction was sent from.
If you have issues connecting, refresh the tool page, tap again Wallet Connect, go to Edge and repeat the steps above.
 
Please let me know.
